prompt: Reproduce the ornate vintage Chinese voucher FRAME from the attached image exactly - the same rich engraved fret border, the same corner ornaments, the same layered inner and outer rule lines, the same cloud-motif accents, the same overall frame richness and proportions. Two differences only: (1) recolor everything to this palette - background field harvest gold #E0AC45, all fret and border line work and ornament in dark ochre-brown #8A6B22, outer edge border cinnabar red #D93A35, thin keyline accents in porcelain cream #F5F1E6; (2) leave the ENTIRE center completely EMPTY harvest-gold field - remove all text, remove the drink illustration, remove the small red seal, remove the bottom banner - the center must be blank gold paper with nothing in it, only the ornate frame around the edges. Flat aged chromolithograph print style, subtle paper grain, no drop shadows, no photorealism, no 3D. Square 1:1.
